name: Eduard Denile
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton male wearing everyday clothing - a coarse linen shirt, coarse linens, and oiled linen shoes. Completely unarmed.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: sharpshooter, resident, investigator, unprepared, unfortunate, victim
Role: Eduard Denile was a sharpshooter and resident of Harlun's Watch who was part of a group sent to investigate reports of "strange lights" at nearby Swampy Cave. Despite being a sharpshooter by profession, he went to investigate completely unarmed and wearing only his everyday clothing, suggesting he didn't expect to encounter serious danger.
Home Location Information: Was a resident of Harlun's Watch before the investigation.
Daily Routine: [Only appears during the related quest - specific routine unknown]
Personality - The Unprepared Investigator: Eduard's decision to investigate the strange lights without weapons or armor suggests he either underestimated the potential danger or didn't believe the situation warranted serious preparation. His profession as a sharpshooter makes his lack of equipment particularly notable, indicating either overconfidence or a belief that the lights were a harmless phenomenon.
author: Bethesda
